productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men White Twenty2Yds Sports Shoes
description: Style Noteadidas created this Twenty2yds Lite IV shoe to appeal to all serious cricket players. The interesting upper, styled to look sleek and sophisticated, ensures maximum comfort while on the field. The key features of the shoe are its light weight and lowness to the ground. Tooling of the shoe ensures maximum stability, reinforced by the spike configuration and plastic lugs for a solid foot plant position while facing those fast deliveries. Needless to say, this product has been endorsed by the master blaster Sachin Tendulkar. Product DetailsRedesigned ClimaCool mesh upper allow your feet to breathe while also providing protection against dustadiPrene in the forefoot offer great impact cushioning and durabilityLateral and medial pro moderator to add great stabilitySynthetic leather overlays stitched to the backfoot for good shoe structureCentral lace ups with a meshed and padded tonguePadded sockliner which is removable to accommodate an orthoticLow foot bed and a wider midfoot for maximum stability3D torsion in the midsole and adiPrene inserts in the heelRubber traxion outsole, has full spike configuration Material and CareSyntheticWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
